description: Project overview, run instructions, structure, and developer notes.
system_usage: Entry point for any new developer or user to understand how to run the project.

description: Standard OpenAPI 3.0 specification defining the API endpoints derived from frontend requirements.
system_usage: Blueprint for implementing the actual Backend API and validating requests.

description: Textual summary of API endpoints specifically used by the JavaScript frontend files.
system_usage: Quick reference for frontend developers to know which endpoints to call.

description: Detailed mapping of all data fields extracted from LocalStorage keys (users, offers, billing).
system_usage: Critical reference for defining Database Schema and Validation logic.

description: JSON representation of the Data Flow Diagram (Level 1) processes and flows.
system_usage: Source file for generating visual DFDs in external tools.

description: Textual description of the Data Flow Diagram (Level 1) processes, inputs, outputs, and stores.
system_usage: Human-readable explanation of system data flows.

description: Entity Relationship Diagram description, listing entities like User, Offer, BillingHistory and their relationships.
system_usage: Guide for understanding the logical data model.

description: SQL Data Definition Language (DDL) script to create tables for Users, Offers, and Transactions.
system_usage: Directly used to initialize a PostgreSQL/MySQL database.

description: MongoDB JSON Schema for collection validation (users, offers).
system_usage: Used to configure validation rules in a NoSQL database.

description: Instructions for extracting data from the live frontend localStorage and importing it into a database.
system_usage: Guide for the data migration process during backend transition.

description: JSON file containing sample data for users, offers, and history.
system_usage: Source of truth for seeding the database or resetting the frontend simulation.

description: Comprehensive report on data sent/collected by the client, including a security assessment.
system_usage: High-level overview of data handling and privacy risks.

description: Automated scan result mapping file paths, types, function definitions, and security findings.
system_usage: Inventory reference for code audit and understanding file dependencies.

description: Audit report listing critical, medium, and low security issues (e.g., plain text passwords).
system_usage: Action list for security hardening before production deployment.

description: Textual representation of Sequence Diagrams for key flows like Registration, Login, and Payment.
system_usage: Specifies the exact order of operations for implementing backend interaction logic.

description: Full system analysis document covering Actors, Use Cases, DFDs, ERDs, and Business Rules.
system_usage: The Master Specification document for the entire system.

description: Executive summary and deliverables checklist for the system modeling phase.
system_usage: Quick overview for stakeholders to understand the modeling outputs.

description: CSV export of all system Use Cases (ID, Actor, Trigger, Flow, etc.).
system_usage: Structured data for importing into project management tools or Excel.

description: Deep-dive textual specification of complex use cases (User Registration, Login, Payment).
system_usage: Detailed guide for developers implementing complex business logic.

description: CSV version of the Use Case summary table.
system_usage: Alternative format for reviewing use case summaries.

description: Markdown table summarizing all use cases for quick readability.
system_usage: Quick reference for understanding system scope and features.
